Name: Chestnut
Description: A standard wild-type agouti color.

Name: Opal
Description: The dilute version of Chestnut (Blue Agouti).

Name: Chocolate Agouti
Description: The brown version of Chestnut.

Name: Lynx
Description: The dilute version of Chocolate Agouti (Lilac Agouti).

Name: Black Otter
Description: Tan pattern with black pigment.

Name: Blue Otter
Description: The dilute version of Black Otter.

Name: Chocolate Otter
Description: The brown version of Black Otter.

Name: Lilac Otter
Description: The dilute brown version of Chocolate Otter.

Name: Black
Description: Solid black color.

Name: Blue
Description: The dilute version of Black.

Name: Chocolate
Description: Solid brown color.

Name: Lilac
Description: The dilute version of Chocolate.

Name: Ruby Eyed White
Description: Total lack of pigment, resulting in a white rabbit with ruby (pink) eyes.

Name: Blue Eyed White
Description: Total lack of pigment due to the Vienna gene, resulting in a white rabbit with blue eyes.

Name: Black Pointed White
Description: Himalayan pattern with black points.

Name: Blue Pointed White
Description: Himalayan pattern with blue points (dilute Black).

Name: Chocolate Pointed White
Description: Himalayan pattern with chocolate points.

Name: Lilac Pointed White
Description: Himalayan pattern with lilac points (dilute Chocolate).

Name: Chinchilla
Description: Salt and pepper appearance with no yellow pigment.

Name: Squirrel
Description: The dilute version of Chinchilla.

Name: Chocolate Chinchilla
Description: The brown version of Chinchilla.

Name: Lilac Chinchilla
Description: The dilute brown version of Chocolate Chinchilla.

Name: Black Steel
Description: Steel version of Black, showing heavy ticking.

Name: Blue Steel
Description: The dilute version of Black Steel.

Name: Chocolate Steel
Description: The brown version of Black Steel.

Name: Lilac Steel
Description: The dilute brown version of Chocolate Steel.

Name: Black Magpie
Description: Harlequin pattern with black pigment on a white background.

Name: Blue Magpie
Description: The dilute version of Black Magpie.

Name: Chocolate Magpie
Description: The brown version of Black Magpie.

Name: Lilac Magpie
Description: The dilute brown version of Chocolate Magpie.

Name: Black Tortoise
Description: Self-based non-extension color with black points.

Name: Blue Tortoise
Description: Self-based non-extension color with blue points.

Name: Chocolate Tortoise
Description: Self-based non-extension color with chocolate points.

Name: Lilac Tortoise
Description: Self-based non-extension color with lilac points.

Name: Orange
Description: Agouti-based non-extension color.

Name: Siamese Sable
Description: A shaded variety with a sepia brown color and darker points.

Name: Smoke Pearl
Description: The dilute version of Siamese Sable.

Name: Sable Point
Description: A shaded variety with creamy white body and sepia brown points. Result of Sable combined with Himalayan gene.

Name: Sable
Description: A shaded variety with a rich sepia brown color, specifically the heterozygous form of Siamese Sable.

Name: Sable Point (Non-Extension)
Description: Sable point produced by the non-extension gene. Often just called Sable Point.

Name: Pointed White
Description: Himalayan pattern with colored points on a white body.
